title: ESFA Update: 12 March 2025
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title        Information Updated 16 to 19 and adult education and skills funding document collection pages   Information Further education free meals rate 2025 to 2026     Latest information for academies     Article Title     Action Submit your school resource management self-assessment checklist   Information Updated 16 to 19 and adult education and skills funding document collection pages   Information Further education free meals rate 2025 to 2026   Information General annual grant (GAG) allocation statements for 2025 to 2026   Events and webinars Hiring supply teachers and agency workers for your school webinar   Events and webinars Risk protection arrangement (RPA) – an alternative to commercial insurance   Events and webinars RPA members only – summer fetes     Latest information for local authorities     Article Title     Information Updated 16 to 19 and adult education and skills funding document collection pages   Information Further education free meals rate 2025 to 2026   Events and webinars Hiring supply teachers and agency workers for your school webinar   Events and webinars Risk protection arrangement (RPA) – an alternative to commercial insurance   Events and webinars RPA members only – summer fetes    "
